<includeonly>{{Country data Myanmar
|1={{{1}}}
|shortname alias={{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Myanmar|Burma}}
|size={{{size|}}}
|name={{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Burma}}}}
|altlink={{{altlink|}}}
|altvar={{{altvar|}}}
|variant={{{variant|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Burma here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Burma for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{Country data Myanmar
|1={{{1}}}
|shortname alias={{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Myanmar|Burma}}
|size={{{size|}}}
|name={{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|Burma}}}}
|altlink={{{altlink|}}}
|altvar={{{altvar|}}}
|variant={{{variant|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
